title: CBDT Streamlines Form 121 Declarations with New UIN and Quarterly Reporting Mandate
content:
# CBDT Streamlines Form 121 Declarations with New UIN and Quarterly Reporting Mandate

Ek important update hai for all payers! Government ne Form No. 121 declarations ke liye Unique Identification Number (UIN) generation aur quarterly reporting ka naya process announce kiya hai. Central Board of Direct Taxes (CBDT) ne iske liye detailed procedure prescribe kiya hai.

Here's a quick rundown of what you need to know:

*   **What's New?** The CBDT has prescribed procedures, formats, and standards for the generation and allotment of a Unique Identification Number (UIN) for declarations furnished in Form No. 121. Additionally, it mandates the quarterly furnishing of Part B of this form by the payer.
*   **Effective Date:** This new procedure will come into force from April 1, 2026.
*   **Who is Affected?** This applies to all payers who are responsible for handling declarations where tax is not to be deducted as per Section 393(6) of the Income-tax Act, 2025.
*   **Payer's New Responsibilities:**
    *   Jab bhi payee Part A of Form 121 (for non-deduction of tax) submit karega, payer ko har declaration ke liye ek Unique Identification Number (UIN) generate karna hoga.
    *   Proper records maintain karne honge.
    *   Part B of Form 121 ko quarterly basis par Income Tax e-filing portal ke through furnish karna hoga, jismein sabhi received declarations aur unke corresponding UINs ki details hongi. This is mandatory even if no tax deduction occurred.
*   **UIN Structure:** The prescribed UIN will be a 26-character alphanumeric code, consisting of a 10-character sequence number (starting with 'D' followed by 9 digits), a 6-digit tax year, and the 10-character TAN of the payer.
*   **Declarations Covered:** This applies to both electronic and paper-based declarations. Paper declarations also need to be digitized by the payer and assigned a UIN.
*   **Notification Details:** These changes are introduced vide Notification No. 01/CPC(TDS)/2026 dated March 28, 2026, by the Directorate of Income-tax (Systems), New Delhi.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.incometax.gov.in/iec/foportal/sites/default/files/2026-03/Notification%20No%2001_CPC%28TDS%29_2026.pdf)

*Published on: 30 March 2026*
